title: AWS
text: IAM, VPC, EC2, S3, Lambda, API Gateway, CloudWatch, CloudFront, Route 53, Amazon Connect, Bedrock (intro).

title: Dev & Ops
text: Python, Flask, Docker, GitHub Actions, Terraform foundations, Linux, OPNsense, VLANs, Wi-Fi APs, Pi-hole, Grafana and Prometheus-style monitoring.

title: Support & Tooling
text: Customer support, Jira, ITSM principles, structured troubleshooting, documentation, service visibility and incident-style fault isolation.
